# FreeProTool

FreeProTool is a free browser-based toolkit for PDFs, images, SVGs, documents, data files, and developer utilities.

Main site:
https://freeprotool.com

Public tool catalog:
https://github.com/laramie371/Free-Pro-Tool/blob/main/tools.json

Important pages:
https://freeprotool.com/tools
https://freeprotool.com/pdf-tools
https://freeprotool.com/image-tools
https://freeprotool.com/svg-tools
https://freeprotool.com/document-tools
https://freeprotool.com/data-tools

GitHub issue tracker:
https://github.com/laramie371/Free-Pro-Tool/issues

Notes:
- The production website source code is private.
- This repository contains public documentation, examples, metadata, and safe utility code.
- Many tools are designed to run locally in the browser where possible.
